metadata.description: A suite of Claude Code plugins providing a virtual development team covering the full software development lifecycle.

plugins.name: devteam-workflow
plugins.description: Pipeline orchestration: requirements elicitation, task plans, and session context management

plugins.name: devteam-architect
plugins.description: Design sessions, ADRs, and independent design critique via a forked expert architect agent

plugins.name: devteam-researcher
plugins.description: API research, library validation, and codebase exploration using isolated Explore agents

plugins.name: devteam-implementer
plugins.description: Standards-enforcing implementation with mandatory requirements and pattern checks before any code is written

plugins.name: devteam-tester
plugins.description: Test generation, isolated test execution, and coverage analysis

plugins.name: devteam-reviewer
plugins.description: Code review, security review, and requirements conformance check via independent opus agents
